//import React, { useMemo } from 'react'; import './HeroPanel.css'; const MONTHS = [ 'January','February','March','April','May','June', 'July','August','September','October','November','December' ]; // Each month gets a unique SVG landscape scene const SCENES = [ // January - snow peaks { bg: ['#0a1628','#1a3a5c'], scene: ( {[...Array(30)].map((_,i) => ( ))} )}, // February - aurora { bg: ['#0d1a2e','#1a3a2e'], scene: ( {[...Array(40)].map((_,i) => ( ))} )}, // March - spring hills { bg: ['#1a3020','#2d5a3a'], scene: ( {[20,120,250,380,520,680,820].map((x,i) => ( ))} )}, // April - rainy lake { bg: ['#2a3a4a','#3a5a6a'], scene: ( {[...Array(50)].map((_,i) => ( ))} {[...Array(8)].map((_,i) => ( ))} )}, // May - wildflower meadow { bg: ['#1a3020','#2d5a3a'], scene: ( {[...Array(60)].map((_,i) => { const x = (i * 15.3) % 900; const y = 155 + (i % 5) * 8; const colors = ['#ff6b9d','#ffd700','#ff8c42','#a855f7','#f472b6']; return ; })} )}, // June - sunset ocean { bg: ['#7a2a1a','#c47a2a'], scene: ( {[...Array(12)].map((_,i) => ( ))} )}, // July - forest { bg: ['#0a1a0f','#1a3a1f'], scene: ( {[0,80,160,240,320,400,480,560,640,720,800].map((x,i) => ( ))} )}, // August - desert dunes { bg: ['#4a2a0a','#8a5a2a'], scene: ( )}, // September - golden harvest { bg: ['#2a1a0a','#5a3a1a'], scene: ( {[...Array(40)].map((_,i) => ( ))} )}, // October - autumn forest { bg: ['#2a1a0a','#4a2a1a'], scene: ( {[0,100,200,300,400,500,600,700,800].map((x,i) => { const colors = ['#c0392b','#e67e22','#f39c12','#d35400','#922b21']; return ( ); })} )}, // November - misty hills { bg: ['#1a2a2a','#2a3a3a'], scene: ( {[...Array(15)].map((_,i) => ( ))} )}, // December - snow night { bg: ['#0a0f1a','#1a2a3a'], scene: ( {[...Array(60)].map((_,i) => ( ))} {[...Array(20)].map((_,i) => ( ))} )}, ]; export default function HeroPanel({ month, year, onPrev, onNext }) { const scene = SCENES[month]; return (
{year}

{MONTHS[month]}

{/* Hanging notch detail */}
{[...Array(16)].map((_,i) => (
))}
); }
